title: psephellus dittrichii
intro: Psephellus dittrichii, also known as the Dittrich's scabious, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, Psephellus dittrichii has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Psephellus dittrichii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
